_meta.note: Canonical EN UI strings. Reference for locale-parity check JA-108 (INV-5 of cross-artifact sync protocol, added 2026-05-17). When adding a new key, mirror it to every other locale in the same commit; the chokai_detail listening labels intentionally carry Japanese text rather than English glosses, matching the in-app pedagogy that those screens display kana labels regardless of UI locale.

settings.title: Settings
settings.keyboard_hint: Press ? on any page to open the keyboard-shortcuts cheatsheet.
settings.subtitle: All settings live on this device. Nothing leaves your browser.
settings.data_help: Use export to back up your progress (no cloud sync). Import re-applies a saved file.
settings.auto_furigana_help: Adds ruby readings on a small whitelist of single-reading kanji (counters, days, fixed compounds). Off by default.
settings.show_recommender_help: When on (default), the home page shows a single suggested next action based on your current state (review queue, last viewed pattern, weak patterns, etc.). All recommendation logic runs on-device — no data leaves your browser.
settings.reset_help: Clears study history, FSRS schedule, test results, streak, known-kanji flags, and settings. Cannot be undone.
settings.reset_confirm: Type RESET to confirm. This wipes every byte of your progress on this device.

review.no_misses: You haven't missed anything recently - keep practising.

home.syllabus_subtitle: Study grammar, vocabulary, kanji, reading, and listening in a structured order.
home.card_grammar_desc: Basic sentence structure, particles, verb forms, adjectives, comparison, requests, and common N5 expressions.
home.card_vocab_desc: Daily life words, time expressions, family, food, school, travel, verbs, adjectives, and common expressions.
home.card_kanji_desc: Numbers, time, people, school, directions, nature, common verbs, and basic recognition kanji.
home.card_reading_desc: Short notices, simple messages, daily-life paragraphs, and basic comprehension practice.
home.card_listening_desc: Greetings, classroom phrases, daily conversations, time, shopping, directions, and simple Q&A.
home.card_test_desc: Auto-scored mock test with correct answers, explanations, and weak-area review.
home.study_step_grammar: Learn basic sentence structure and particles
home.study_step_review: Mixed drill: grammar + vocab + kanji SRS

grammar_detail.meaning_easy_ja: 意味（やさしい にほんご）

vocab_detail.no_examples: No example sentences in the corpus yet for this word. Try the search bar to find phrases that include it.
vocab_detail.devoiced_no_dev: No devoicing in standard Tokyo speech for this form.

kanji_detail.okurigana_intro: Where the kanji stem ends and the okurigana (kana suffix) begins:

chokai_detail.show_script: スクリプトを 見る

dokkai_detail.translation_disclaimer: Translations are study aids, not the default render. Try the Japanese first; reveal English only when stuck.

meta.no_misses: You haven't missed anything recently - keep practising. Wrong answers from Test and Drill flow into this list automatically (most recent 200).
meta.most_recent_misses: Most recent ${n} miss(es) from Test and Drill (capped at 200). Newest first.
meta.clear_confirm: Clear the wrong-answer history? FSRS schedule and test results stay intact.
meta.test_setup_intro: Configure and start a new auto-graded test. The Submit button stays disabled until every question has an answer.
meta.scores_stay_local: Your scores stay on this device. No account. No leaderboard. No data leaves your browser.
meta.first_mock_hint: Take your first mock test when you've covered at least lessons 1-10. If you're new, study a few patterns first - missed items will flow into Review and Daily Drill automatically.
meta.sitting_intro: Take the entire JLPT N5 in one sitting: Moji + Goi (25 min) → break → Bunpou + Dokkai (50 min) → break → Listening (30 min). Total ~110 minutes including breaks. Each section runs at the official time budget; unanswered questions auto-submit at zero.
meta.pick_paper_intro: Pick a paper number. All 4 sections from that paper number combine into one sitting.
meta.progress_empty: Stats appear here once you've studied.
meta.progress_empty_help: Mastered, Need-practice, and Untested counts appear after a Test or completed lessons.

trust.footer_strip: No login · No tracking · Works offline · Open source · 100% on-device · Free, no ads, no paywall.
trust.test_callout: Your scores stay on this device. No account. No leaderboard. No data leaves your browser.
trust.privacy_hero: This app does NOT collect, transmit, or store any personal data on a remote server. Verifiable in the open-source code.
trust.install_pitch: No login. No tracking. No ads. Works offline once installed.
trust.feedback_note: Feedback opens your email client locally — no server proxy, no telemetry. Your message goes directly to the maintainer.

footer.trust_strip: No login · No tracking · Works offline · Open source · 100% on-device · Free, no ads, no paywall.
